name: solo-squad
description: A complete agency operating system for Claude Code. Engineering sprints, campaign ops, sales pipeline, design studio, and project management - all as slash commands.

metadata.description: Combines the best of Superpowers, gstack, Compound Engineering, and Agency Agents into one unified plugin marketplace for digital agencies and solo builders.

plugins.name: engineering-sprint
plugins.description: Full engineering workflow: brainstorm, plan, build, review, QA, ship, and compound. TDD-first methodology with subagent-driven development, git worktree isolation, and multi-agent code review.

plugins.name: campaign-ops
plugins.description: Digital marketing campaign operations: SEO audits, PPC strategy, social media planning, content calendars, ad creative, tracking audits, paid media audits, and AI citation strategy.

plugins.name: sales-pipeline
plugins.description: Agency sales pipeline: outbound prospecting, discovery call prep, deal strategy with MEDDPICC, proposal writing, pipeline analysis, and account expansion planning.

plugins.name: design-studio
plugins.description: Design system creation, design review with AI slop detection, UX research planning, brand consistency checks, and AI image prompt engineering.

plugins.name: project-command
plugins.description: Multi-client project management: client kickoffs, sprint planning, status reports, experiment tracking, feedback synthesis, and team retrospectives.

plugins.name: power-tools
plugins.description: Safety guardrails, security audits (OWASP/STRIDE), performance benchmarks, browser automation, cross-AI code review, and destructive command protection.
